passageText:
‘What did you do for your birthday, Jane?’ Lucy asked her friend.


‘I had a party on Saturday,’ Jane said. ‘I’m sorry you couldn’t come.’


‘I went to see my aunt and uncle on Saturday. We drove to the (12) and sailed to the island,’ Lucy said. ‘We wanted to have a picnic, but it was too (13) and I didn’t have my coat. So, how was the party?’

‘Well, the party was good. There were lots of people and we ate cake and (14) and we drank lemonade,’ Jane told Lucy.


‘And what did your mum and dad give you?’ Lucy asked.

‘They gave me a brown (15). He’s very clever. He’s called Skip,’ Jane said. Then Skip ran inside and jumped on Lucy’s legs.


‘Look!’ Lucy said. ‘He’s very (16). He played in the grass and now he’s wet.’

‘Yes he is.’ Jane said. So she got a towel and the two girls cleaned Skip.

titleQuestion.text: Now choose the best name for the story. Tick one box.
